creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
I am closing this in preference for 207359 that assigns the issue to the base system.

Having DW_CFA_remember_state/DW_CFA_restore_state not save/restore cfa information in the system's libgcc_s is not any compiler's problem.

Also it turned out that the other C++-exceptions symptoms originally seen on TARGET_ARCH=powerpc for clang 3.8.0 based buildworld's do not trace back to this issue. As near as I can tell the problem for this is a clang/clang++ code generation issue and not a gcc/g++ issue (nor a system issue).
